text.title: ITALIA VS FRANCIA : IL MIGLIOR CROISSANT?
text.u: This video starts like this before a
classic race around Parco Sempione, because
every time we run around
Parco Sempione we always go to eat
in the same French pastry shop and
we will challenge it with
the best French pastry shops in
Nice. And do you know why? I know. Do
you know why? By the way, look, it's
Friday, February 13th, in two days
we have Nerox as a couple, Bertra and I, in
Nice. Anyway, friends of the
main channel, I don't know if you follow me on
Instagram or on the Giovanni Fo
Vlogs channel, but it's been a few months since I
started running almost every day
and I'm doing a lot of running races
and really a lot of Ierox this
hybrid competition, but for
more information on my races I recommend you
follow me on Instagram. Finished 6km jog
in 32 minutes and 49 seconds. Race finished. I
changed. Now I'll show you where
Legalit is located in Milan. To make you
understand, we start from there, from the heart,
from the Arch of Peace. going straight over there
, right there, back there where
that blue tent is, there's legalite.
I want to clarify one thing because in my opinion they
won't let us make videos, they'll
remove us because it's a bit of a
twitchy place. They break the boxes a bit
every now and then, but we'll see about the
laws.
Here it is. This is the logo. A
bakery, patisserie and cafe. I'm going
silly, but first of all I ask
permission to record a video.
Can I ask you a question? Ask inside. I'm
making a video for YouTube. I'm repeating with my cell phone
. I ask. I told the
boss, every time here we are
allowed to just take the food
into ourselves while we eat. I didn't
expect this difficulty in
asking, but they're good. Come on. So,
since I can't film anyone,
here at the entrance, without me
disturbing anyone, there are all the
carry-on items, while if we go inside we go towards
the restaurant where we can
stop and eat. Anyway, they have a
lot of bread, my goodness, they even
make a lot of it inside. And this is the
lab where they do everything. How
beautiful. I would now stay and look at the
pastry shops. This
is the counter where we will now choose
everything. So, there's really a lot to
choose from. I
've actually tried almost everything
here, but I'd like to get
some classics, even the two
classics, because I want to
compare them to the ones in Nice. So, we'll
definitely take the chocolate bread.
These are my favorites, guys.
Croans with raw ham and
cheese are my absolute
favorite. Here we will have a
classic croan. I think that's the Valentine's Day special
. That over there is the
Olympic Pyramid special for the
Milan Cortina Olympics.
That's one of my favorite desserts.
The Tarsitron. Oh, there's also the Clairre,
very charged. Today I'm waiting for Berta
who went to change, but he hasn't
shown up yet. However, I noticed that
there is no New York Roll, the one like the
giant swirl, the New York roll
with pistachios and chocolate inside.
Bertra usually joined us there. Now
we can eat. Very hungry. Very
hungry.
We'll eat a lot of stuff. Come on, let's try
everything. We take absolutely everything there is
. Enough. So, I'll get some
stuff. Classic croissant, then a
chocolate, lemon, croissant with ham, then
the Lecce cor, also that bombetta with
the cream there and then a soy cappuccino
and a normal cappuccino. And the fact that
I don't have my Olympic pyramid now
makes me cry. Plus I spent
€29 where, come on, I
got a lot of stuff. €29, but
I forgot the water, which you're going to
buy. But most importantly,
the thing I wanted to get,
that is,
the Olympic pyramid, ended up being gone. But there is the little
Valentine's heart. So,
we have this one here that is with
cooked ham. Unfortunately there was no raw ham, no
chocolate éccle, no something like that. What is that
? And
the chocolate penis.
That's little heart for us.
That's my favorite food in here anyway
Wine? Yes.
And the cream puff. So,
let's start with the first quisson with
classic croissant dough, cooked ham,
salad
and formagello
and formacello cheese. You
absolutely will not have me do this
. It
's not a test for us because we eat
more than once a week. When
the cheese arrives it's even better. But
a nice knife.
I want to say one thing. I have the
French pastry and maybe you agree with me.
In my opinion, French pastries are a
taste that
you develop over time as a child. Like if
you give me this one, a panciiocolà
compared to a croissant you used to get in
Rome and the classic brioche ones, the
slightly more buttery ones, those are another type of
croissant. When I was little, I thought about that a lot
more.
In my opinion, it's also a habit. I
like these better.
Maybe it reached you first here in Milan too
. possible.
So, let's go to the Crossan Classico
instead.
You got blank.
Yes, because we have to try it empty
in France too. In this video we compare
Italy and France, not the
best and most famous places for French pastry
because we are going to Nice which has some of the
best things. Yes,
this is a very famous pastry chef, but
not even the best in Italy. If
you want a comparison, perhaps between Paris and
some French pastry chef in Italy
that you recommend in the
comments below, we'll get 10,000 likes and I'll
pass it on to him in Paris too. I wander.
We should go to Sidric someday. I know. Do
you feel the butter? The dough doesn't taste
like the sugary Italian ones we
're used to.
What can a food influencer do? Oh
guys, look at that alveolation.
Perfect, I said my piece. I have no
idea what that means, but come on.
Let's move on to our brother Pan Cioccolà
and I'll give you a spoiler: I
tried it in France in one of the
best French patisseries and I
always confirm that for me the
Roman chocolate parcel that I ate as a
child is 10 times better because there's
chocolate inside, whereas in the
pancioccola there are two sticks of
[ __ ] chocolate and you barely taste them
. A little better. It's good,
but it's not as simple as a croissant,
that is, there's nothing different in a morzo.
Remove the chocolate. I've never been
a fan of chocolate bread.
The dough is good.
Yes, a lot, but if it had this dry
chocolate it would be a hit. You're slow,
I'll pass the cream bomb that I'll eat
halfway.
This is the scam for €1.20.
A little small. It's the same as the
Roman donut, the Roman bombolone, the one with all
the sugar, but it costs six times as much and
isn't as good. Let's take
the ECler.
Well,
nice and stuffed inside. Cincino. Cheers. Do
you remember your birthdays as a child or
family dinners when you brought out
pastries made of batter on the
bottom that puffs up and then has
a chocolate coating on top? You know what it was like
when you were little and you
wore them and it's something that if you
liked them because kids like
chocolate.
Very good.
Yes, because you were a kid. Eat
now in
very good. Now
I'm saying it's the same thing, but
the one they ate when they were little was
disgusting. This one is good because the
cream is [ __ ] good. It tastes just like
chocolate. C da picco tasted like
cream. I raise a hand.
We probably had two
different childhoods, but when I bought pastries I
bought them from good bakeries, so it
was good.
Then don't do it, don't break our
hearts.
Let's go to a party together.
No, go away.
Things? Stuffed.
Strawberry jam on top. I thought it
was stuffed inside underneath.
No, but it's delicious.
Because perhaps you like the dough a little
harder, a little more cooked,
a little more with Cantello. I liked it a lot
. In any case, we will give the
final vote shortly. When I took my trip to
Barcelona by car we went to
a random pastry shop and I tried Tarsitron for the
first time. I have a
really big problem with all
lemon desserts. All lemon desserts
drive me crazy.
This one in particular is one of my
all-time favorites. It is perfectly
balanced, it tastes a lot of lemon, but
also of cream, meringue.
The shortcrust pastry is super buttery, I admit.
The crostiera, the dessert that we put
as the sweetest fettera that best, is very
good, you get a lot of it, but this is
another level. It's not a sweet lemon, it's
a pimento lemon, so it flatters your
mouth and then it's sweetened by the
meringue on top. I could eat
20 of these,
three or so, all of them,
probably one of the best desserts
in the Cité. I make the best second
ending.
Go.
I appreciate
pastries like the tazzitron, the
leccla, and the slightly more unusual flavors
with creams much more than the classic ones. We
had never tried Lecler from here.
I do.
I do not. Damn, so much better than
I imagined. Yes, it really is like
chocolate gosso. I could
also try the vanilla one,
which is what these are, the
French creams, a little more French-style, that is, it
's not chocolate, which only tastes like
chocolate, it's a little more diluted with the
custard, what the [ __ ], it's
different from the Italian creams.
But stop and think about what creams you're going to buy
in Italy. There are some
Italian pastas, perhaps the ones I used to eat
as a child, that were just
too diluted. On Croassan, in my opinion,
we can do better. I've had
Croassan with better doughs, a little
sweeter which I like better, but
now we're going to compare them with those in
France, so you know what I want
now,
guys? Little extra. I took
another savoury piece, the cocmossier and the
Olympic pyramid. Only
my friend Berta just
left us. I have to try
this Olympic pyramid somehow, which has
chocolate inside.
You can tell it's not freshly made, but
inside it's almost like a very cold ice cream mousse
, very good, pleasant.
The dough is a little more consistent,
compressed, like a square croissant, and
the sugar on the outside is also good.
This here is the flan, custard and
vanilla. I do
n't like [ __ ] flan flan. And now we move on to the
but
I think this is the limit of legality. There's a
lot of cheese inside. There is
matabasta on top of this cheese there is
more. There is cheese that has been
cooked on top and cheese that has not been cooked on top.
I know like I could get it from
next time. I had never tried it.
Anyway, now with this, Legarit
has gained points in my opinion. There is. Too bad the
flan wasn't that amazing, but
now we really have to fly to
France.
France.
Goodbye goodbye. Welcome to F. What are
we eating in 50 minutes? Here we

beats us. It's so complicated to find a
parking space for this car in
this lovely little town. Guys,
2:53 a.m., if you're interested, we

parking spot.
I'm really not very euphoric about how

won't see us anyway, but our

Well done Bertla.
We have arrived. We had a long

inside. Eh,

now and you

morning.
We sold out. Okay. We have the tart citron,

got yesterday in Calité. After that, a

unidentified
pistachio dessert.
We can move the chair, they told us we can't

How classic is this French thing
? So, I'm giving it a good bite
now. The pasta is very very very
thick. Oh,
yes it is very beautiful, but it does

of meringue. It
is true.
I have a problem with tarsitrons, but
this one is good. Not even the cream
inside is much more meringue, so
it is much more sugary, but the cream is

plus you can taste the batter, you chew it. It's

cool, huh.
It's very good. Every
now and then, bite into the lemon peel too.
This one is very good. Bea. Are you ready to

there really is so much butter.

is amazing,
